proposed_relations.description: Existing bus lane conditions on Utica Ave are documented in the Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study

evidence_refs.source_quote: The diagram illustrates the existing conditions of Utica Ave and its surrounding streets. ... Two specific areas are highlighted ... '7 AM-7 PM Bus Lane' ... '7 AM-10 AM & 4 PM-7 PM Bus Lane'
• Traffic congestion is worst on approaches to Eastern Parkway

rationale: Blocks p006_c0002 and p006_c0004 under 'Existing Conditions' heading (p006_c0001) describe the existing bus lane conditions on Utica Ave — including bus lane hours at Union St and President St — as part of the study's baseline documentation.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The diagram illustrates the existing conditions of Utica Ave and its surrounding streets. The map shows a grid of streets with Utica Ave running vertically in the center. To the left of Utica Ave are St Johns Pl, Lincoln Pl, Eastern Parkway, Union St, President St, and Carroll St.
• Traffic congestion is worst on approaches to Eastern Parkway
